docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,973.00 FILED BY YOO, JAE HEE AS TO DEFENDANT FLORIAN, SANDY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-25-2023 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-25-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-25-2023 BY STEPHEN M. MURPHY. PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT JAE HEE YOO IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT/CROSS-CLAIMANT SANDY FLORIAN IS PRESENT. JAE HEE YOO WAIVES SERVICE AS TO SANDY FLORIAN'S CROSS-CLAIM. PLAINTIFF/CROSS-DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: STEPHEN M. MURPHY; CLERK: S. KANE. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-25-2023 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YOO, JAE HEE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FLORIAN, SANDY $2,475.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,525.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PAY PLAINTIFF $2,525. SEE ATTACHMENT #1 (MC-025) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-25-2023 - JUDGMENT.
ORDER REQUEST TO APPEAR AT HEARING BY ZOOM PLAINTIFF GRANTED**

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON DEFENDANT'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT FLORIAN, SANDY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT YOO, JAE HEE PLAINTIFF SHALL PAY DEFENDANT $0.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
